topics.title: Secret Santa and Studio Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio members discuss Secret Santa gifts, a coworker's excessive cookie consumption, the costs of pet healthcare, and an upcoming holiday appearance.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Merger and Simpsons Production Stories
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming history of Howard Stern broadcast, the regulatory hurdles facing the satellite radio merger, and behind-the-scenes anecdotes involving George Takei and Hank Azaria on The Simpsons.

topics.title: George Takei and Holiday Celebrations
topics.summary: The studio discusses a past interaction with George Takei, listens to a recording of an intimate encounter involving an intern, and hosts a Secret Santa exchange for the staff.

topics.title: Secret Santa Gift Exchange
topics.summary: The studio participants exchange and discuss their holiday gifts, including a Marc Jacobs bag with a gift certificate, a sterling silver letter opener, an iPhone, and wooden wind chimes.

topics.title: Wind Chimes and Secret Santa Gifts
topics.summary: The studio explores the history of wind chimes, discusses local holiday traditions, and shares various gifts exchanged during a Secret Santa celebration.

topics.title: Staff Gift Exchange and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio records a segment featuring staff members exchanging holiday gifts, discussing production details with guests, and addressing a caller's claims regarding a car loan.

topics.title: Controversial Office Ham and Sexual Tapes
topics.summary: The studio reacts to a coworker's questionable food safety practices regarding a holiday ham and listens to a recording of a sexual encounter involving Benji and Ivy.

topics.title: Promotional Segment for Giftscriptions.com
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding a gift subscription service and the personal experiences of guests during media appearances.

topics.title: Wedding Plans and Name Changes
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding upcoming wedding plans, the selection of a new last name, and the promotion of magazine subscriptions.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip Game
topics.summary: The studio hosts a game where guests must identify which of four celebrity-related stories is fake.

topics.title: Holiday Music and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio reviews various holiday songs from their archives while discussing a guest's appearance and interacting with callers regarding domestic violence awareness.

topics.title: Massage Parlor Raid and Adult Video News Awards
topics.summary: The studio features a guest recounting a police raid at a massage parlor, followed by a discussion with Greg Fitzsimmons regarding his role as host for the upcoming Adult Video News Awards.

topics.title: Holiday Wrap-up and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses holiday gift exchanges, a segment on adult film star Bella Donna, upcoming schedule changes for the show, and Howard Stern's comments regarding paparazzi and neighbors.

topics.title: Sports Scandals and Cloning News
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming reports on steroid use in Major League Baseball, the logistics of an awards show appearance, and a news segment regarding a glowing cloned cat in South Korea.

topics.title: Ike Turner Death and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the death of Ike Turner, his musical legacy, low album sales for American Idol finalists, and upcoming film releases.
